editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=2 of 226 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
Prediction interval not definable for k<3; flag as boundary condition.
RoB 2.0: 0 high-risk + 1 some-concerns domains; add low-RoB sensitivity analysis.
k<3 - NNT ≈ 70 (computed from current trial pool); cannot project to future populations without k>=3 (prediction interval undefined). Interpret MCID against trial-specific populations only.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
